languages.original_text: "The abductor knows exactly how to protect the environment from the pernicious effects of the tech-heresy! Look, some of the corrupted augmetics have been removed altogether, and some have been replaced with similar-looking but completely inert constructions. This cadaver has undergone an extremely skilful autopsy ritual!"

languages.text: "Гораздо поразительнее другое: похититель предельно точно знает, как обезопасить окружение от тлетворного воздействия техноереси! Вглядитесь, часть оскверненной аугментики удалена вовсе, еще часть заменена на внешне похожие, но совершенно инертные конструкции. Сей кадавр подвергся чрезвычайно искусному ритуалу аутопсии!"
languages.translation_comment: found in the Trazyn Museum the remains of a fabricator from Kjava Gamma (our planet)

languages.text: 「この誘拐犯は、テクノロジーの悪影響から環境を守る方法を完璧に知っている！ほら、腐敗した増幅器の一部は完全に取り除かれ、一部は似たような外観だが完全に機能しないものに取り替えられている。この死体は非常に巧みな解剖術によって解剖されている！」
languages.original_text: "The abductor knows exactly how to protect the environment from the pernicious effects of the tech-heresy! Look, some of the corrupted augmetics have been removed altogether, and some have been replaced with similar-looking but completely inert constructions. traits.locale_text: 「この誘拐犯は、テクノロジーの悪影響から環境を守る方法を完璧に知っている！ほら、腐敗した増幅器の一部は完全に取り除かれ、一部は似たような外観だが完全に機能しないものに取り替えられている。この死体は非常に巧みな解剖術によって解剖されている！」

languages.text: « Le ravisseur sait parfaitement comment protéger l'environnement des effets pernicieux de la technohérésie ! Regardez, certains des augmétiques corrompus ont été retirés, tandis que d'autres ont été remplacés par des appareils à l'aspect similaire, mais complètement inertes. Ce cadavre a été soumis à un rituel d'autopsie très méticuleux ! »
languages.original_text: "The abductor knows exactly how to protect the environment from the pernicious effects of the tech-heresy! Look, some of the corrupted augmetics have been removed altogether, and some have been replaced with similar-looking but completely inert constructions. This cadaver has undergone an extremely skilful autopsy ritual!"

traits.locale_text: « Le ravisseur sait parfaitement comment protéger l'environnement des effets pernicieux de la technohérésie ! Regardez, certains des augmétiques corrompus ont été retirés, tandis que d'autres ont été remplacés par des appareils à l'aspect similaire, mais complètement inertes. Ce cadavre a été soumis à un rituel d'autopsie très méticuleux ! »

languages.text: "Der Entführer weiß genau, wie er die Umgebung vor den schädlichen Auswirkungen der Tech-Ketzerei schützen kann! Seht her, einige der korrumpierten Augmentationen wurde ganz entfernt, während andere durch ähnlich aussehende, aber inaktive Konstruktionen ersetzt wurden. Dieser Kadaver wurde einem ausgesprochen versierten Autopsieritual unterzogen."
languages.original_text: "The abductor knows exactly how to protect the environment from the pernicious effects of the tech-heresy! Look, some of the corrupted augmetics have been removed altogether, and some have been replaced with similar-looking but completely inert constructions. This cadaver has undergone an extremely skilful autopsy ritual!"

traits.locale_text: "Der Entführer weiß genau, wie er die Umgebung vor den schädlichen Auswirkungen der Tech-Ketzerei schützen kann! Seht her, einige der korrumpierten Augmentationen wurde ganz entfernt, während andere durch ähnlich aussehende, aber inaktive Konstruktionen ersetzt wurden. Dieser Kadaver wurde einem ausgesprochen versierten Autopsieritual unterzogen."

languages.text: "Kaçıran kişi çevreyi tekno kâfirliğin zararlı etkilerinden nasıl koruyacağını tam anlamıyla biliyormuş! Bakın... Yozlaşmış ogmetiklerin bazıları tamamen çıkarılmış, bazıları ise benzer görünümlü ancak tamamen eylemsiz yapılarla değiştirilmiş. Bu kadavra son derece yetenekli bir otopsi ayininden geçmiş!"
languages.original_text: "The abductor knows exactly how to protect the environment from the pernicious effects of the tech-heresy! Look, some of the corrupted augmetics have been removed altogether, and some have been replaced with similar-looking but completely inert constructions. This cadaver has undergone an extremely skilful autopsy ritual!"

traits.locale_text: "Kaçıran kişi çevreyi tekno kâfirliğin zararlı etkilerinden nasıl koruyacağını tam anlamıyla biliyormuş! Bakın... Yozlaşmış ogmetiklerin bazıları tamamen çıkarılmış, bazıları ise benzer görünümlü ancak tamamen eylemsiz yapılarla değiştirilmiş. Bu kadavra son derece yetenekli bir otopsi ayininden geçmiş!"

languages.text: «¡El raptor sabe exactamente cómo proteger el entorno de los efectos perniciosos de la tecnoherejía! Algunos de los aumentos corrompidos han sido extirpados enteros, y otros se han reemplazado por aparatos similares pero totalmente inertes. ¡Este cadáver ha sido sometido a un ritual de autopsia extremadamente hábil!».
languages.original_text: "The abductor knows exactly how to protect the environment from the pernicious effects of the tech-heresy! Look, some of the corrupted augmetics have been removed altogether, and some have been replaced with similar-looking but completely inert constructions. This cadaver has undergone an extremely skilful autopsy ritual!"

traits.locale_text: «¡El raptor sabe exactamente cómo proteger el entorno de los efectos perniciosos de la tecnoherejía! Algunos de los aumentos corrompidos han sido extirpados enteros, y otros se han reemplazado por aparatos similares pero totalmente inertes. ¡Este cadáver ha sido sometido a un ritual de autopsia extremadamente hábil!».

languages.text: “这位绑架者非常清楚如何让环境免受技术异端的毒害！看，一些被污染的植入物已被完全移除，而有些则被替换成外观相似但毫无活性的结构。这具尸体经历了一场极其高超的解剖仪式！”
languages.original_text: "The abductor knows exactly how to protect the environment from the pernicious effects of the tech-heresy! This cadaver has undergone an extremely skilful autopsy ritual!"
